name: Pill
description: Small interactive label element used for quick actions, selections, and removable tokens; supports grouped and selectable behavior via PillGroup.

value.description: Unique value for the pill; required for selectable behavior inside PillGroup.

disabled.description: Disables pill interaction. In a group, inherited group disabled state also applies.

onClick.description: Called when the pill is activated by click, Enter, or Space.

pillGroup.selectionVariant.description: Determines whether pills behave as standard buttons or selectable checkboxes.

pillGroup.selected.description: Controlled selected values when selectionVariant is multiple.

pillGroup.defaultSelected.description: Uncontrolled initial selected values when selectionVariant is multiple.

pillGroup.onSelectionChange.description: Called when selectable group values are toggled.

pillGroup.disabled.description: Disables all pills in the group.

slots.children: Pill label content and optional icons.
slots.pillGroup.children: One or more Pill elements rendered inside the group fieldset.

keyboard: Pill: Tab / Shift+Tab — move focus into/out of pill in tab order
Selectable PillGroup: Space — toggle selected state of focused pill
Selectable PillGroup: Tab enters first pill; Shift+Tab enters last pill
aria: In selectable groups, each Pill uses role='checkbox' with aria-checked
Provide an accessible group label using visible FormField label or aria-label / aria-labelledby
For closable pill patterns with icon-only affordance, provide an explicit aria-label describing removal action
